codeList:
helm repo add zilliztech https://zilliztech.github.io/milvus-helm
helm repo update zilliztech
helm search repo zilliztech/milvus --versions
kubectl get pods
helm upgrade my-release zilliztech/milvus \
  --set image.all.tag="v2.5.16" \
  --set mixCoordinator.enabled=true \
  --set rootCoordinator.enabled=false \
  --set indexCoordinator.enabled=false \
  --set queryCoordinator.enabled=false \
  --set dataCoordinator.enabled=false \
  --reset-then-reuse-values \
  --version=4.2.58
helm upgrade my-release zilliztech/milvus \
  --set image.all.tag="v2.5.16" \
  --reset-then-reuse-values \
  --version=4.2.58
# Verify all pods are ready
kubectl get pods
helm upgrade my-release zilliztech/milvus \
  --set image.all.tag="v2.6.18" \
  --set streaming.enabled=true \
  --set indexNode.enabled=false \
  --reset-then-reuse-values \
  --version=5.0.22
# Check pod status
kubectl get pods

# Verify Helm release
helm list
headingContent: Upgrade Milvus Cluster with Helm Chart

anchorList.label: Atualizar o cluster Milvus com o Helm Chart
Passo 2: Atualizar para a v2.5.16 com o mixCoordinator
Passo 3: Atualize para a versão v2.6.18
